description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a monthly schedule. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows, each running on a different environment and building the project in Release and Debug configurations. For build-linux, install dependencies, install Rust, generate the build system with CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact. For build-windows, install Rust, download RapidJSON, generate the build system with CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact.
